home.title: Digital agency in Medellín
home.description: Digital agency in Medellín, Colombia. We design and build websites, e-commerce, AI-powered technical SEO, automation, CRM, and SaaS platforms.

nosotros.title: About us
nosotros.description: We're beleafdesign, a digital agency in Medellín. Strategy, development, design, and AI automation for companies across Colombia and Latin America.

servicios.title: Services
servicios.description: One team, every digital solution your brand needs: web, SEO, branding, marketing, AI, CRM, and more. Serving Colombia, LATAM, and the US.

portafolio.title: Portfolio
portafolio.description: beleafdesign's portfolio: e-commerce, SaaS platforms, technical SEO, AI, and branding for companies across Colombia and LATAM. Projects that speak for themselves.

contacto.title: Contact
contacto.description: Tell us what you need to build. We'll reply within 24 business hours with a clear plan for your project.
